h25e47462g0a22g4c42g8155gbcd796fa68ae: Mistress!  It's me, yer loyal servant, Sazza. I'm back - an' I brought a friend.
h2bd5a90fg4f1ag42cag8bdag8dc7c27d7406: A duergar? Tell me, Sazza, did your misadventures take you to the Underdark?
he1198aa2g087bg4733ga97agbc7053864290: They woz in some rickety druid grove! Mostly full of tieflin's, but them intruders you're after were hidin' out there!
h1eea6c9fg1cffg42c5gaa38g78a0a30fa640: I presume you dealt with my prey, and massacred the rest?
he823823ag90b1g4a2bg8740g6c689e3678a0: Ah... well, the thing about that is... they sorta massacred us.
h72c5017cgdb26g4eb6ga558g1f494364c4bc: But this mug helped me to escape. I say we stick a few holes in him... show how grateful we are.
hf11ebb3ag7e10g4ceeg9763g0b4b51c92ea9: This mug helped me to escape though. I say we stick a few holes in her... show how grateful we are.
h38d34a2fgbc0fg4f4bg9a51gb11ea6acff6c: *You feel a cold hand caress your mind as the drow appraises you.*
h8009e3abg1398g4160g825cg41209320e782: Oh dear. Your prisoner is one of the Absolute's favourites, Sazza. A True Soul.
hde2c396bge66fg4540g8c9fga5e1d4e8e549: Nah. Can't be... they woz in the grove, hangin' around with the tieflin's.
hd4f45425gdb6ag4e6ega9f3ge74f9a9a4fd6: Undercover, no doubt. Carrying out the Absolute's will. Oh, Sazza - you have made a grave error.
hbe49a48ag2fb0g4b10g927fg4dc701513204: And it will be your last. My spiders are hungry, little one...
h5fb58cbcga0cbg4043g8573g25ce663995c7: ... but before they feast, tell me where that grove is, and I may yet spare your life.
hcdacee67g1864g42f8g9eeag6092cf1ee6db: It's past the bridge, to the east! Big ol' gate, covered in ivy! Don't hurt me, mistress. Please!
h63137458g354dg4e87gbdddgcd62a0ca7ef6: I will not hurt you. My spiders will have that pleasure.
hee04e9cag97ccg403bg881dg4f44ee13a5e2: No! I mucked up, I'm sorry! But I didn't know who they woz... they didn't tell me nothin'!
h43505ac1g6756g4dc8g8d71g1f1bf52d7380: You only have to look at me to know I'm your superior, wretch.
h4824e6dega45bg47d9g8af4gef5deb81f3bc: Through sheer luck, that pathetic worm has brought me the information I need.
hc430a5bagc89ag497eg9011g31953496625a: And it seems that the inhabitants of the grove trust you - we can use that against them.
h92d392e5g20f7g41eeg9259gffe01ea15a4a: You have a part to play in this slaughter.
h1036452agdd9dg4b71ga716g12df0f26332a: Return to the grove. When my raiding party approaches, throw open the gate and signal me.
h03136c2egfc93g4bcdgb532geb1e4c648793: Many of the inhabitants of the grove are already dead.
h84a235aeg8d02g49c6gbaf1g73a9340639e4: You started the slaughter without me? How selfish.
h251f07f6gf8b7g4070gb42fg904aaba65f6b: But we can still fight side by side. Together, we will destroy any who have not died or fled.
hced5a51bg376cg4d5dg822cg6feae9f5362a: There's a problem - the grove is sealed by a druid ritual.
h4988c32bgd78cg4676ga074gbaa453a3724d: Their god is weak. Roots and branches will not save them from the Absolute's fury.
h0e6b6476g4dd0g4608g8bbegab6c8e0e2622: I want no part of this.
h02dafbdeg090bg42afg94e9g145bbce2cff8: I do not intend to lead a suicidal charge. The goblins are expendable; I am not.
hfcbb4014g7657g407dga15cgeeccec955b84: The Absolute brought you here for a reason - to throw open those gates and crush our enemies.
h84e3e5cag30aag4607g9e81gd43bffef7fe9: All right. Expect me at the grove.
heeb43acbg9be2g4b75gaf6fgd135040812a2: Excellent. When you give the signal, we will break them.The Absolute will reward us.
hd75746b8g4bbcg4eb9g83a4g8a717c57ac1f: I have another matter to take care of first.
h7ad9feecgeef1g4072gab36g32f079a9bef9: Take care of it quickly. You are needed here, and my patience wears thin.
h9aab4689g25c5g440dgbe8cg183fe938ed07: And I'm happy to do it - for a price.
hf678dcdfg7344g4e62gb520gfb720b033718: You are honoured to serve a cause - a god - what greater reward could there be?
hdbee8017gdb35g457fga6dag1d54561743ee: I won't be much use to the cause if I'm destitute.
h69b64800gbc49g4922g8475g3ab7b7f796fc: I will see you at the grove; on your signal, we break them.
h45ee6456g3ef8g4d58g8bbfgc8ef8c4d00dc: Kill our enemies, and take what you need.
hf45637fag5ce6g4476ga036gaf2c719f22cf: We are servants of the one true god, not mercenaries.
h9e38bc61g3636g4df8gbf88gb0acfd5639e8: You're right. Serving the Absolute is its own reward.
h0afe4d21ga45dg4e0fg9f10g560b0d8c879d: Absolute be damned - Lolth is our goddess, and you are a heretic.
hb98dea94g369ag4a13ga94dgafcabf662bb7: The Absolute has nothing to do with it. I'm here to kill you.
h96588aabg0ef5g4b3fg89b9gb206e2c87698: You turned from Lolth for this Absolute. For that, you die.
hd8169e0eg0fb9g4ee5gb317ge78982863e0e: You misunderstand. I'm here to slaughter you.
hcfdbaffdg18f3g4650g8716gdc80df6ae09e: You coulda told me who you woz!
h4e09926fga3bdg4852g8aa6gea76b5609fbd: She's telling the truth. She didn't know.
h434b8abegc8ddg4da2g8ae9ged868af8add3: I told ya! I was tryin' to follow orders best I could!
h1f184ad7g824bg4407g8f11g77399602e359: Silence, wretch. And remember - you owe your miserable life to this one.
h55de2e42gf3a3g4bafga02cg33698fd8ae62: I won't cause any more trouble - I swears it.
hb6f3b36cg2ba4g4b16gba33g4deca046e04f: I explained everything to her. She's just too stupid to understand.
hc8ac78e9g59a4g49e0g8af1gc777164bdc20: A liar as well as a fool? I hope you're at least digestible.
h384a0107g6152g4ea0g93d4g06bfa5c820b9: It ain't true! Them's the bloody liars!
h12fe8055g240dg4920gae22ged11a97f10c1: I got myself nabbed though; ended up all snug in a cage instead of smashed. I'm wily like that.
hc464ca2bg5e6cg487bg8fdbg6a60f480adc1: And then the Absolute answered my prayers - sent a True Soul to save me!
ha3c4e87ega919g4562gb58bg29b3cfb29a00: A drow? Tell me, Sazza, did your misadventures take you to the Underdark?
hdf3f59b6g8dadg46a6g9a40g616b5fde094d: How thoughtful. And where did you find this friend?
